title: stelis irrasa
intro: Stelis irrasa, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Stelis irrasa include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
